description: Edge: Surge turn — all Charge multipliers elevated, +1 bonus AP

player.surgeNote: Surge turn: +1 bonus AP granted (total 4 AP). globalTurnCounter = 6.

hand.name: Double Strike
hand.description: Next attack card hits twice at full power. Charge bonus: also pierces.

relics.name: Time Warp
relics.description: On Surge turns: quiz timer halved, Charge multiplier 5.0×, +1 AP (already applied: 4 AP total).

notes: SURGE TURN with Time Warp relic: Charge multiplier is 5.0× instead of 1.5×. +1 AP (4 total). This completely changes the math: Charged Heavy Strike (2ap+1surcharge=3ap) = QP×5 = 10×5=50 damage on correct! But Double Strike + Heavy Strike = 5 AP (exceeds 4). Empower + Heavy Strike Charged = 50% more × 5.0× multiplier = enormous damage. Does the player know to go all-in on a single charged attack rather than spread out? Surge creates a 'glass cannon moment' design space.
